input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.10.6.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.10.6.1
            TITLE: noise levels may be monitored at any time

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.10.6.1: Noise levels may be monitored at any time
IN.10.6.1 Noise levels may be monitored at any time

final_answer: Noise levels may be monitored at any time
